# GitHub Configuration
This directory contains GitHub-specific configurations for the graphql-workflow-playground project.

## Files

- **workflows/ci.yml** — Continuous Integration pipeline for linting, type-checking, building, and testing
- **CODEOWNERS** — Team assignments for code review
- **dependabot.yml** — Automated dependency updates
- **issue-templates/** — Issue templates for consistent bug reports and features
- **pull-request-template.md** — PR template for consistent descriptions
